characters.name: B.L. Tomato
characters.description: B.L. TomatoNormalTomatonaterAliasesTomatonater(evil alter-ego)The Very Dark and Very Edgy Sidekick(by themselves)RelationshipsBlendar(boss)Fruit Islanders(Dislikes)Vegetable Islanders(Dislikes)OccupationBlendar's sidekickBiographical InformationStatusAlivePhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Tomato)GenderMale[1]Eye ColorWhite with violet pupilsProduction InformationVoiced byAshleigh BallFirst Appearance"Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus"Last Appearance"Captain Nut & the Power Fruits" "What am I? A fruit, or a veggie? Not knowing which, is worse than a wedgie."―B.L Tomato,Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus B.L. Tomatois a tomato who was first seen in "Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus" as a competitor for TheTalent Show, and then later becomes a major antagonist in "Captain Nut & the Power Fruits" as Tomatonater. B.L. Tomato is a sensitive tomato who was unsure on whether he was a fruit, or a vegetable and due to this, he never really felt as if he belonged on both Fruit and Vegetable Salad Island. He is shown to enjoy poetry, even writing a poem for their frustration on the fruit or vegetable debate. B.L Tomato can also be vengeful, as sometime after the events of Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus, B.L Tomato decides to switch sides and join Blendar, as a way to get revenge from the bullying in the island.

characters.name: Bernie Mango
characters.description: Bernie MangoBiographical InformationPhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Mango)GenderMaleProduction InformationVoiced byMatt DannerMichael DonovanFirst Appearance"Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus"Last Appearance"Frozen in Time" Bernie Mangois a mango who owns a refreshments stand and is an inhabitant ofFruit Salad Island, He is often seen as a background character. Bernie appears to be a mango with a leaf on top of his head wearing a bowtie with arms and legs. Nothing about Bernie's personality is known, as he is mostly just seen in the background doing nothing or is interacting with the dangers thatFredcauses.

characters.description: BettyBiographical InformationPhysical DescriptionSpeciesInanimate ObjectGenderFemaleProduction InformationFirst Appearance"Master of Disaster"Last Appearance"The Ripley Van Ripened Book of World Records" Bettyis an inanimate wooden masthead who lives withWedgieonFruit Salad Island. characters.name: Biggest Fruit Pie in the Universe
characters.description: Biggest Fruit Pie in the UniverseBiographical InformationPhysical DescriptionSpeciesGiant Alien PieGenderMaleProduction InformationFirst Appearance"Captain Nut & the Power Fruits"Last Appearance"Captain Nut & the Power Fruits" TheBiggest Fruit Pie in the Universeis a character that appears at the end of the episodeCaptain Nut & the Power Fruits, invadingFruit Salad Islandthreatening to turn all of the inhabitants into pie filling. The Biggest Fruit Pie in the Universe appears to be a three legged pie monster with multiple eyes. Little is known about the Biggest Fruit Pie's personality due to little screen time, but it is known that he wants to turn all of Fruit Salad Island into Pie filling.

characters.name: Bingo Cherry
characters.description: Bingo CherryCurrentPrototypeAliasesMr. Prettypants(house security name)Biographical InformationStatusAlivePhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Cherry)GenderMaleProduction InformationVoiced byTracey Moore("No News is Good News!" up to "Amuse-Otel")Britt McKillip(rest of the series)First Appearance"No News is Good News!"Last Appearance"Frozen in Time" Bingo Cherryis one of the 6 main characters of "Coconut Fred's Fruit Salad Island!". He is a cherry who is easily scared by anything and everything. He is usually seen hanging out withCoconut Fred,Slip and Slide D'PeelandBunga Berryand also works asMel Greenrind's assistant, writing rules in the Squeaky Board, getting him drinks and more. He was voiced byTracey Moorefor the first two episodes, then was voiced byBritt McKillip, who also voicedTiffany Pears, for the rest of the series. Bingo is shy and timid, and can get scared by everything.
characters.personality_section: Bingo is shy and timid, and can get scared by everything.

characters.name: Blendar
characters.description: BlendarNormalSupervillain OutfitPrototypeAliasesWalking Blender Thing(byMr. Greenrind)OccupationSupervillainBiographical InformationStatusAlive(presumably)Physical DescriptionSpeciesBlenderGenderMaleEye ColorRed sclera with black pupilsProduction InformationFirst Appearance"Master of Disaster"Last Appearance"Captain Nut & the Power Fruits" "As you can see, I'm dishwasher friendly, and laser beam safe!"―Blendar,Captain Nut & the Power Fruits Blendaris a walking blender who was first seen in "Master of Disaster" as one ofFred'screations, and later serves as a major antagonist in "Captain Nut & the Power Fruits". Blendar is a twisted and evil person. His only goal is to blend up everyone inFruit Salad Islandand then the entire world to turn them into the biggest fruit smoothie ever.
characters.personality_section: Blendar is a twisted and evil person. His only goal is to blend up everyone inFruit Salad Islandand then the entire world to turn them into the biggest fruit smoothie ever.

characters.name: Bunga Berry
characters.description: Bunga BerryBiographical InformationStatusAlivePhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Strawberry)GenderMaleEye ColorYellow sclera with indigo pupilsProduction InformationVoiced byDavid KayeFirst Appearance"No News is Good News!"Last Appearance"Frozen in Time" Bunga Berryis one of the 6 main characters of "Coconut Fred's Fruit Salad Island!". He is a wild strawberry from a primitive village who speaks in grunts and gibberish that only few can understand. He is often seen hanging out withCoconut Fred,Slip and Slide D'PeelandBingo Cherrybut is usually quiet or idle until needed. He was voiced byDavid Kaye, who also voicedRusty Candu. Bunga Berry seems to act primitive a lot. Whereas he would howl or scratch himself at times, but he will rarely act like most of the other fruits.
characters.personality_section: Bunga Berry seems to act primitive a lot. Whereas he would howl or scratch himself at times, but he will rarely act like most of the other fruits.

characters.name: Butchy
characters.description: ButchyAliasesButchy the Rotten Apple("Fruit Canal")Baron Butchy(game alias)Biographical InformationStatusAlivePhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Pippin Apple)[1]GenderMaleProduction InformationVoiced byEric BauzaFirst Appearance"Fruit Canal"Last Appearance"Frozen in Time" "I'm a bully, okay! and as a bully, I don't have time to play around with you. I have a job to do, and that is to pick on little kids. Starting with the smallest, and working my way up!"―Butchy,One Bad Apple Butchyis the main antagonist of "Coconut Fred's Fruit Salad Island!". he is a gravenstein apple who isFruit Salad Island's residential bully. He usually serves as the foil forCoconut Fredandhisfriends. He, of course, makes up a rude personality. Due to his despicable behavior. He states that he likes to bully little kids from the smallest, and "working his way up".
characters.personality_section: He, of course, makes up a rude personality. Due to his despicable behavior. He states that he likes to bully little kids from the smallest, and "working his way up".

characters.name: Coconut Fred
characters.description: Coconut FredCurrentPrototypeAliasesFredLifeguard Fred("No News is Good News!")News Reporter Fred("No News is Good News!")The Amazing Nut("Hocus Pocus Lack of Focus")Sir Nutalot("Sir Nutalot")Captain Nut("Captain Nut and the Power Fruits")OccupationLeader ofCoconut Fred's All-Body Sound BandCreator ofFruit Salad IslandBiographical InformationStatusAlivePhysical DescriptionSpeciesFruit (Coconut)GenderMaleEye ColorYellow sclera with black pupilsProduction InformationVoiced byRob PaulsenFirst Appearance"No News is Good News!"Last Appearance"Frozen in Time" "Yay me!"―Coconut Fred's catchphrase Coconut Fredis the titular main protagonist of "Coconut Fred's Fruit Salad Island!". He is a coconut and the creator/founder ofFruit Salad Islandwho unknowingly can wish everything he imagines into reality. He hangs out and goes on adventures with his friends,Slip and Slide D'Peel,Bingo Cherry,Bunga BerryandMel Greenrind. A happy-go-lucky and hyperactive coconut with a strange imagination and gary-stuish personality. Fred has the special ability to turn whatever he imagines into reality. He can often be heard with his trademark catchphrases "Yay me!", "Now You're Talking, Coconut!", and "I could make that fun!". He does not understand the concept of feelings, and can only express happiness.

He does not understand the concept of feelings, and can only express happiness.

characters.name: Coconut Fred Copies
characters.description:
Coconut Fred CopiesBig Mouth FredSilly Face FredBaby Face FredCartwheeling FredRaspberry FredAliasesCoconut Fred ClonesBiographical InformationStatusDeceased (Implied)Physical DescriptionSpeciesCopy of a Fruit (Coconut)Production InformationVoiced byRob PaulsenFirst Appearance"Coconut Freds"No News is Good News!(Real Fred)Last Appearance"Coconut Freds" Coconut Fred Copies, as the name states, are copies ofFredmade using theCopymacator 1522. Unsurprisingly, they all are basically Coconut Fred, but each clone has a different appearance.
Big Mouth Fred has a big mouth, as his name suggests, Silly Face Fred seems much clumsier than his original, and later on appears with Skiing gear, Baby Face Fred has a younger appearance and wears a diaper and a bow on his strand, Cartwheeling Fred does not seem to have any difference, and Raspberry Fred seems to have a sneaky face and sometimes has his tongue out.
